creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freebsd.org/java/>: 

> pkg install linux-oracle-jdk18

Impossible. Please see, for example, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/107e3f1e066cb02ad5b981aec1e05477a3a4ae04> (2014-04-01): 

>> Redistribution of repackaged binaries not permitted

… and so on.
